titles.en: Larification of the Transmission Chain to rifa'ah Ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas
Larification of the Transmission Chain to rifa'ah Ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas

segments: ه عن رفاعة بن موسى النخّاس فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن رفاعة بن موسى النخّاس‌.
arabic.text: ه عن رفاعة بن موسى النخّاس فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن رفاعة بن موسى النخّاس‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Rifa'ah ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Rifa'ah ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Rifa'ah ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Rifa'ah ibn Musa Al-Nakhkhas.
